---
title: "domWebSocketDriver()"
description: "Adapt a DOM/WebSocket constructor into a graph-local WebSocket driver."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Adapt a DOM/WebSocket constructor into a graph-local WebSocket driver.

## Import

```ts
import { domWebSocketDriver } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
```

## Signature

```ts
function domWebSocketDriver(WebSocketCtor: WebSocketConstructorLike = requireGlobalWebSocket()): LocalWebSocketDriver
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WebSocketCtor` | `WebSocketConstructorLike` | WebSocket constructor used to open connections. |

## Returns

A driver that can connect, send, and optionally stream live sessions.

## Example

```ts
import { domWebSocketDriver } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";

const ws = domWebSocketDriver(WebSocket);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/environment.ts`
